reasoning: The Manifold question asks if BTC will close above 80K by the end of March 2026. The current date is March 29, 2026. According to recent news reports, BTC was trading at $66,616 on the morning of March 29. Throughout March, BTC's highest local peak was around $76k early in the month. The price has since dropped and is currently experiencing a downward trend, influenced by geopolitical tensions and market volatility. To reach a closing price of 80K by the end of March (meaning on March 29, 30, or 31), Bitcoin would need to increase by approximately 20% in three days from the $66,616 level. While extreme crypto volatility makes a sudden jump physically possible, the base rate of a $13,400+ jump in essentially 48-72 hours under current bearish/consolidating market conditions driven by geopolitical fears is astronomically low. Therefore, the chance of this occurring is nearly zero. I will assign my lowest possible probability of 0.02, reflecting only tail risk of a once-in-a-decade positive shock.
